reason: Test bug in test_claude_md_dep_strategy_updated: it searches for 'Gotchas' (finds first occurrence at position 6623 in text 'see Gotchas') instead of '## Gotchas' (actual section header at position 17306). The gold solution correctly places PCH/cc/cxx content in the Gotchas section at position 17519, but the test only checks the first 5000 chars after position 6623, missing the actual content. Gold reward=0 due to this test bug; cannot fix without modifying tests which is prohibited.
